---
title: "Mary Anne Pratt"
---

## Mary Anne Pratt

**Dates:** 1814/5-1888

**Maiden name:** (Davys)

### Description

daughter of the Rt. Rev. George Davys

### Biography

She was the daughter of the Rt. Rev. Dr. George Davys (1780-1864), Bishop of Peterborough, who owed his preferment to his having been chaplain to the young Queen Victoria. His wife Marianne Mapletoft (1788/9-1858) had been a childhood friend of FMY’s. Mary Davys before her marriage was Extra Woman of the Bedchamber to Queen Victoria. She married (1844) the Rev. Henry Pratt [Marriage index; Coleridge, <i>Life</i>;  Boyle’s Court Guide 1846]

### Letters

- Letter from Sept 26th 1899
- Letter from Wednesday 5 [December 1838]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
